prompt: Wide eye-level interior of a homeowner's kitchen table at warm dusk, a stapled multi-page home improvement contract spread out across the wooden tabletop with several pages turned and overlapping. A reading lamp in the upper right casts a single warm tungsten pool of light over the documents. A worn black leather portfolio open beside the contract holds a fountain pen. A pair of reading glasses folded on top. Out of focus in the background: a kitchen window with the last of dusk light, a worn ceramic mug. The contract pages show paragraph layouts and signature blocks, but every line of text is abstract visual texture — no legible characters anywhere. Shot with a 35mm prime lens at three-quarter angle, dusk warm tungsten dominates with cool window-light fall-off. Slightly desaturated palette, a red mug as the only saturated color. NOT HGTV bright, working-contractor catalog feel. No readable text.
